rules.name: Double-Entry Balance
rules.description: Total debits must equal total credits for each transaction (double-entry bookkeeping)

rules.name: Transaction Amount Limit
rules.description: Transaction amount must not exceed the configured maximum threshold

rules.name: Approval Threshold
rules.description: Transactions exceeding the threshold require manager approval

rules.name: Segregation of Duties
rules.description: Transaction initiator and approver must be different individuals

rules.name: Duplicate Detection
rules.description: No duplicate transactions with same amount, account, and timestamp within the time window

rules.name: Unauthorized Account
rules.description: All accounts must be in the approved chart of accounts

rules.name: Timing Anomaly
rules.description: Transactions outside business hours require override flag

rules.name: Missing Required Fields
rules.description: All mandatory transaction fields must be present and non-empty

rules.name: Ledger Consistency
rules.description: Debit and credit amounts must be positive and internally consistent

rules.name: Policy Violation Pattern
rules.description: Transaction descriptions must not match known policy violation patterns
